evidence_summary: Establish the protagonist's physical and mental disorientation upon returning to Earth. The visual language must emphasize a sense of claustrophobia and decay through high-contrast lighting and macro textures of disintegrating Martian garments.

John Carter awakens in a dark, claustrophobic cave in Arizona. He is wearing strange, decaying garments that crumble as he moves, signaling a transition from his Martian life back to terrestrial reality.
Confusion $\rightarrow$ Disorientation/Physical discomfort.
John Carter lies motionless in darkness; eyes closed.
John Carter is awake, disoriented, and physically uncomfortable amidst crumbling fabric.
Awakening and physical movement causing garment disintegration.
